perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women sit at a dining table; one holds a transparent container of pesto spread while the other eats pasta. A large 'Costco Wholesale' logo is overlaid at the top. (2) Transition to a kitchen countertop where olive oil is poured into a grey frying pan, followed by cooked pasta and scoops of the pesto cheese spread. The pasta is tossed with sliced red onions. (3) Back to the table, the women continue eating and talking enthusiastically, with one giving a thumbs-up gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female voices begin speaking immediately over upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop music. (2) Sound of a gas burner clicking on and oil sizzling in a pan becomes audible, while the narration continues. (3) The voices maintain an enthusiastic tone with slight eating/slurping sounds as they taste the food, ending with a cheerful final remark.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top. (2) Hook: '好市多新品' (Costco New Arrival) and '超級無敵推薦' (Super Invincible Recommendation) in large colorful fonts. (3) Functional: Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout the video translating the speech. (4) Decorative: '隱藏吃法' (Hidden Recipe) appears during the transition to cooking.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Cooking Demonstration -> Tasting and Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators onscreen throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long straight black hair and wears a black and white top. The other has dark hair, a white lace top, and a dark blue Kangol beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern home interior featuring a marble-patterned dining table and a kitchen with a gas stove and blue cookware.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To endorse a new pesto garlic cheese spread found at Costco by demonstrating its versatility through a cooking recipe and providing a positive taste review to encourage consumer purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product showcase, verbal praise, and a dedicated cooking tutorial using the specific brand item.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style captions and hyper-enthusiastic vocal delivery.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard social media influencer format for food reviews, emphasizing a 'hidden' way to use a common product to increase engagement.
